name: Sandwich with Chicken-Avacado-Tarragon Filling
recipeInstructions:
1. Cook the chicken in a skillet over medium heat until fully cooked through.
2. Prepare the herb bouillon by dissolving the cube in boiling water.
3. Slice an avocado and spread it on one side of the bread.
4. Place the cooked chicken on top of the avocado slices.
5. Sprinkle tarragon over the chicken.
6. Add a pinch of salt and pepper to taste.
7. Close the sandwich with the remaining slice of bread, press down gently to secure.
